# Third-Party Source

## libvterm

`libvterm-src/` is a vendored source snapshot imported from:

`https://github.com/neovim/libvterm`

License: MIT. See `libvterm-src/LICENSE`.

This snapshot is present to start the Tab5 official-firmware terminal port
without waiting for hardware access. Revisit the import mechanism before a
release-quality integration: vendored snapshot, submodule, or subtree are all
possible depending on the official firmware repository policy.
